a_image.alt: Lottie-Heavy Animation style mood board — Heavy Motion · Lottie

sections.a_eyebrow: Animation · Heavy Motion · Lottie Animation · Engaging · Playful
sections.a_description: Playful animated illustrations, rounded corners, and the warm approachability of Lottie-powered UI — Lottie-Heavy Animation design integrates vector animations seamlessly into clean interfaces, creating experiences that feel alive without the performance cost of video. The soft purple accents, generous border-radius, and friendly typography create a warm foundation for the animated illustrations that define this style.

This animation-rich style powers onboarding flows, empty states, loading screens, and feature explanation sections across modern web apps. You'll see it on fintech apps explaining complex processes, health-tech platforms making medical info approachable, ed-tech sites engaging learners, and SaaS products using motion to guide users through multi-step workflows.

a_image_cover.alt: Lottie-Heavy Animation style use case illustration
Lottie-Heavy Animation style use case illustration
Lottie-Heavy Animation style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The friendly, illustration-forward aesthetic of Lottie-heavy websites — playful animated illustrations integrated seamlessly with clean UI, creating experiences that feel alive and approachable. Background: soft off-white (#fafbfd) with a warm, inviting feel. The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a generous shadow (0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)) and 16px border-radius — soft and rounded to match the friendly character of Lottie animations. Colors: bright purple (#8b5cf6) as the primary accent — playful and creative, complementing the illustrated animation style. Near-black (#1e1e2e) for headings, soft gray (#6b7280) for body text. The aesthetic is warm, approachable, and motion-rich — designed to delight rather than impress. Set in Nunito — rounded, friendly, with soft terminals that match the organic character of Lottie animations. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #1e1e2e. Eyebrow at weight 600, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #8b5cf6. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #6b7280. Buttons: primary — bright purple (#8b5cf6), white text, 12px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, purple border. Alternatives: Quicksand (rounded geometric), Rubik (friendly geometric).
